title: Selecting Multiple Y Axis Columns on a Bar Chart Daskboard
excerpt: I was previously able to create a bar chart on a dashboard that allowed me to select two different columns to display on the Y axis. I noticed today that the bar charts I created previously are no longer showing both col…

posts.author: Stu-Clearpath (Stu Moriens)
posts.cookedHtml: I was previously able to create a bar chart on a dashboard that allowed me to select two different columns to display on the Y axis. I noticed today that the bar charts I created previously are no longer showing both columns on the Y axis and when I create a new bar chart, when I select a second column, both columns get unchecked. Does anyone know if there was a change made to monday.com dashboards that would lead to this behavior and what I can do to ensure two columns are displayed on the Y axis of a bar chart on a dashboard?

posts.author: Nadi (Andreas)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the exact same issue. Hope this gets fixed soon.

posts.author: Stu.Moriens (Stu Moriens)
posts.cookedHtml:
I contacted Veeva support. They told me the following:

We have investigated this behavior and we are having an issue with the chart widget, we have escalated this to our developers so they can deploy a fix for this issue.

Once I have an update from our developers I will be following up with you.

I’ll post an update here when I hear back from monday.com support.

posts.author: Stu-Clearpath (Stu Moriens)
posts.cookedHtml:
This issue has been resolved.

@Nadi

posts.author: LaShaye (LaShaye Floyd)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m currently having this same issue. I even tried deleted the widget from the dashboard and adding it back in. Can someone please let me know if this problem still persists or if my situation is an anomaly?
